name: Suite 9 — RAG (verified-query paraphrase + similarity)
description: Tests the verified-query cosine gate. Each case is a paraphrase of an existing entry in verified-queries.json — it MUST match (cosine >= 0.90) and skip the LLM. Plus 2 near-miss cases that should NOT match (cosine < 0.90, falls through to LLM).

Scenarios.Question: give me the total count of tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: who created the most tickets top 5
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: list open tickets please
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets by status breakdown
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: users who never created a ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: mom ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1)) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0
Scenarios._note: MoM acronym should match 'compare-this-month-vs-last-month' via variants

Scenarios.Question: summarize ticket trends and tell me a story
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT YEAR(CreatedAt) AS Year, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY YEAR(CreatedAt) ORDER BY Year
Scenarios._note: Should NOT match any verified entry directly; vague enough to fall through to LLM

Scenarios.Question: compare my data with industry benchmarks
Scenarios._note: Out-of-scope — no verified entry, no DB data; should chat-respond or refuse politely

Scenarios.Question: tickets similar to a login issue
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE (Title LIKE '%login%' OR Title LIKE '%signin%' OR Title LIKE '%authentication%') AND IsDeleted = 0
Scenarios._note: Could go through SemanticSearch path or LLM-cold; either is acceptable

Scenarios.Question: tickets about password problems
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE (Title LIKE '%password%' OR Title LIKE '%passwd%') AND IsDeleted = 0
